general_ai_community: Permission resolution improved - content-level ask now overrides tool-level allow (security fix)
PR session linking - sessions auto-link to PRs via gh pr create, --from-pr flag added
Gateway/enterprise fixes - Bedrock/Vertex beta header and context validation errors resolved
Corporate proxy support - mTLS and proxy connectivity fixed for enterprise environments
specific_workflows: Use --from-pr to resume work on existing PRs - matches orchestrator workflow well
Review permission rules - ask now properly overrides allow at content level
ripgrep timeout errors now reported instead of silent empty results - improves Grep reliability
Claude in Chrome enabled for VSCode - potential for browser automation from IDE
CLI remains most stable interface - Windows bash fixes in 2.1.27 if needed
